title: 不道德行为 / Unethical Behavior
summary: 典型:虚假陈述、churning(刷佣频繁交易)、twisting(损客户换单)、隐瞒、不适合推荐、挪用资金;后果含处分与失信。 / Typical examples: misrepresentation, churning (excessive trading for commission), twisting (detrimental policy replacement), concealment, unsuitable recommendations and misuse of funds; consequences include sanctions and lost trust.

sections.heading: 典型表现
sections.body: churning=为赚佣金诱导频繁交易;twisting=诱导退保换新单而损客户利益;误导/隐瞒风险费用/推荐不适合产品。

sections.heading: Typical forms
sections.body: Churning = excessive trading for commission; twisting = inducing a detrimental policy replacement; misleading/concealing risks or fees/unsuitable recommendations.

sections.heading: 更严重情形与后果
sections.body: 挪用客户资金、伪造文件属严重违规甚至犯罪;后果含罚款/禁业/撤牌乃至刑责。

sections.heading: Severe forms & consequences
sections.body: Misappropriating funds or forging documents is serious misconduct or crime; consequences include fines/prohibition/revocation and criminal liability.

keyPoints: churning=刷佣频繁交易 / Churning = excessive trading for commission
twisting=损客户换单 / Twisting = detrimental replacement
挪用资金属严重违规 / Misappropriation is serious misconduct
